Magnetic Separator Pick Up Tool Industrial Quality 8 lbs Quick Release Handle

Make fast work of sorting found gold or other metals with the 8lb Magnetic Pickup Tool with Quick Release Handle. A great tool to add to your home garage shop tools. The handheld magnet tool will help to quickly and efficiently separate magnetic debris. Via the easy-to-use, rubberized quick release handle, the pick-up tool will assist in recovering metal from your work area..

Key Features

  • MAGNETIC SEPARATOR PICKUP TOOL: A great tool to have for separating metal objects from non-metal objects; the built-in handle makes the handheld magnet pickup tool easy to use and on works when you squeeze the handle
  • FAST EFFICIENT AND COMPACT: At just under five inches tall, this powerful and compact handheld magnet tool can grab up to 8lbs of metal material; works quickly and efficiently to separate found metal from other material or debris
  • EASY TO USE QUICK RELEASE HANDLE: Easy to use, simply pull the handle upwards for quick release of your gold or other metal finds; the magnetic pickup tool handle is rubberized making it comfortable to hold and easy to grip when releasing
  • MULTIPURPOSE TOOL: Used in other home or commercial settings like a workshop, garage, construction site, house renovation and more for picking up or separating metal materials
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Magnetic Surface Diameter Dimensions: 2 inches; Handle Material Rubber; Body Material: Metal; Weight: 0.15lbs or 2.4oz

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MSPUT
  • UPC: 060886141631
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 8 lb

Fast and efficient. This tool comes in at just under five inches tall, but this powerful and compact handheld magnet tool can grab up to 8lbs of metal material, effectively separating found metal from other material or debris. What makes the magnetic pickup tool so efficient to use is the rubber, quick release handle. Simple and ergonomic in design, the quick release handle is easy to use; simply pull the handle upwards for quick release of your gold or other metal finds. Importantly, the magnetic pickup tool handle is rubberized, making it comfortable to hold and easy to grip when holding or releasing. The rubber handle also makes the magnetic pickup tool easy to carry, as it can be clipped on to an equipment bag or backpack via a carabiner or carabiner clip. Lightweight at just 2.4 ounces, the magnetic pickup tool won’t add bulk or take up any extra room.
